selection_likelihood:
High - candidate covers all core technical 
  domains (Snowflake, Databricks, Azure/AWS, dbt, Airflow, CI/CD, data        
  governance) plus deep AI/ML experience (MLOps, Gen AI, model registry,
  experiment tracking, model versioning) that maps to AND's AI
  Foundry/SLM/agentic requirements; delivery experience aligns with Data      
  Product, Data Mesh, and semantic layer patterns; leadership, stakeholder    
  management, and multi-vendor delivery demonstrated across all roles.

skills.Cloud Platforms:
AWS (S3, EC2, EMR, Glue, Redshift), Snowflake, Azure
   (Data Factory, Databricks, Synapse, AI Foundry), GCP, Terraform
skills.Data Engineering Tools:
DBT, Databricks, PySpark, Kafka, Data Vault  
  2.0, CDC, ELT, Looker, Looker API, Apache Airflow (DAGs), Fivetran, MLOps,  
  Model Registry, Experiment Tracking, Model Versioning, Agentic AI, SLM
skills.CI/CD:
Git, CI/CD pipelines, Automated Testing, Code Reviews, Azure  
  DevOps, Agile/Scrum, L3 Support
skills.Data techniques:
ETL, ELT, Data Modelling, DWH Models, Data Mesh,    
  Data Products, RAG, Serverless, Metadata Management, Data Governance, Data  
  Quality, Observability, Self-Service Analytics, Near-Real-Time Inference,   
  Feature Drift Monitoring, Model Rollback, Human-in-the-Loop, AI/ML
  Workflows

Build A Rocket Boy:
Architected **Data Products** and **RAG**-enabled **AI** workflows on
   **Snowflake** and **Databricks**, establishing **MLOps** foundations with  
  model registry, **experiment tracking**, and **model versioning** for       
  production **Gen AI** workloads.

Led **Snowflake** DWH model design with **dbt** implementing **Data  
  Mesh** principles, creating domain-owned, federated **data models**
  integrating 100+ source systems across 120+ TB with **semantic layer**      
  governance.

Built **Serverless** **ELT** pipelines using **Fivetran**,
  **Python**, **Azure Functions**, and **Apache Airflow** DAG orchestration   
  with **observability**, implementing **Human-in-the-Loop** validation for   
  high-stakes **AI** outputs.

Designed **metadata management** and **data provenance** frameworks  
  for **AI** pipelines, enabling **data quality** monitoring and **feature    
  drift** detection across **Azure AI Foundry** and **Snowflake** ML
  services.
Delivered enterprise **Data Products** in **Snowflake** with **dbt** 
  and **Apache Airflow** orchestration, implementing **metadata management**, 
  **data lineage**, and **data governance** controls for 250+ TB of regulated 
  fintech data.

Implemented **near-real-time inference** pipelines for pre-trade     
  market data, delivering **Data Mesh**-inspired self-service datasets with   
  semantic definitions enabling Product, Risk, and Finance teams to consume   
  governed analytics.

Built **SLM**-type decision models using rules engines and
  **AI**-augmented monitoring, incorporating **Human-in-the-Loop** validation 
  for regulatory compliance in P&L and VaR analytics workflows.

Led technical architecture reviews and **code reviews** for
  cross-functional teams, mentoring junior engineers on **DWH modeling**,     
  **Data Mesh** principles, and **serverless** deployment patterns in
  **Azure** and **AWS**.
Sodexo:
Architected **Data Products** for fintech transaction analytics using
   **Databricks**, **Fivetran**, and **Azure** serverless services,
  establishing **metadata management** and governedsemantic layers for 1M+    
  daily transactions.

Implemented **RAG**-style data discovery patterns through **Looker   
  API** semantic layer, enabling cross-functional teams to query governed data
   products with natural language and self-service **BI**.

Led **CI/CD** and **automated testing** frameworks with **Azure      
  DevOps**, embedding **Human-in-the-Loop** review stages for production      
  deployments of **ETL** pipelines and **AI** model integrations.

Mentored team on **Data Mesh** adoption and **data product**
  thinking, establishing domain boundaries and naming conventions that reduced
   technical debt by 45% across **Snowflake** and **Databricks** platforms.
Wherescape USA:
Designed enterprise **DWH models** and **Data Products** for
  multi-tenant clients using **Snowflake** and **AWS**, implementing
  **metadata management** and **data lineage** controls for auditability and  
  compliance.

Built **Serverless** data ingestion pipelines with **AWS Lambda** and
   **Fivetran**, delivering **Data Mesh**-ready federated datasets with clear 
  ownership semantics for IoT and supply-chain analytics consumers.

Led **Agile/Scrum** delivery of **data migration** and **ETL**       
  modernization projects, establishing **CI/CD** standards and **code review**
   practices that accelerated delivery cycles across FTSE-scale clients.
